name: Teleport
description: Instant transportation to any place, at any distance — if the caster knows where he is going. Blind of the destination, teleportation is 75% uncertain: a percentile roll under 75 is death. Knowing the general topography but not having studied it carefully leaves 10% low and 10% high: low (01-10) is death in solid matter; high (91-100) is a fall of 10-100 feet, possibly fatal. After careful prior study only 1% teleports low and 4% arrives high (a 10-40 foot fall).
period_conventions: percentile bands typed per ir-a11 conventions; source arithmetic example corrected under ir-a4 lives at p18, not here
